sections.paragraph:
f. ( Hab 3:4)-

(1) shining splendour, as of fire, Isa 4:5 of the sun, 2Sa 23:4 when rising, Pro 4:18 of the moon, Isa 60:19 of a sword, Hab 3:11 of the glory surrounding God (כְּבֹוד יְהֹוָה), Eze 10:4 Hab 3:4 Psa 18:13.

(2) [Nogah], pr.n of a son of David, 1Ch 3:7 14:6 .

נגה

emphat, נָגְהָא Ch. light. Dan 6:20, בְּנָגְהָא by candle light. [In Thes. the meaning given is morning light, which is a preferable sense. Syriac ܢܳܓܗܳܐ, ܢܳܓܰܗ etc., the first dawn of the morning.]
